title: Damage waiver as job-only option, signed estimate flows to shareable invoice

requirements.text: Remove the verbose Stripe explanation text and instructional copy from the Job Detail page (JobDetailPage.tsx) Stripe payment section. The section must only display the 'Charge via Stripe' button and the 'Paid' / 'Unpaid' payment status badge. Do not remove the button or badge functionality — only strip the explanatory prose and UI note copy.

quotes: the stripe explanation is not necessary

acceptanceCriteria: No instructional text, inline notes, or explanatory copy appears near the Stripe button on the Job Detail page.
The 'Charge via Stripe' button remains visible and functional.
The 'Paid' / 'Unpaid' badge remains visible and reflects stripePaymentId presence.

requirements.text: Move the damage waiver section so it appears exclusively on the Job Detail page (JobDetailPage.tsx) as an optional, toggleable field — not on the Invoice/Estimate preview page header or as a globally visible element. On the Job Detail page, add a 'Damage Waiver' toggle or checkbox that, when enabled, stores the waiver acceptance on the job record. The default waiver text is: 'I acknowledge that pre-existing damage, cosmetic issues, or conditions not caused by the repair technician are not the responsibility of Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC. By signing below, I agree to these terms.' The waiver text must be configurable/editable inline on the job form. When the waiver is enabled on a job, the waiver text must be passed through to the Invoice/Estimate preview page and displayed prominently before the signature section on the estimate/invoice.

quotes: Correct the damage waiver forms only an option on the job

acceptanceCriteria: The damage waiver does not appear on any page other than JobDetailPage.tsx as a job-level option and on InvoicePreviewPage.tsx when the waiver is enabled for that job.
JobDetailPage.tsx has a damage waiver toggle/checkbox that is off by default.
When the waiver is toggled on, the editable waiver text field is revealed with the default text pre-populated.
The waiver enabled state and text are persisted on the job record (via updateJob or a dedicated backend field).
When navigating to the Invoice/Estimate preview from a job with waiver enabled, the waiver text appears prominently before the signature pad.

requirements.text: On the Invoice/Estimate preview page (InvoicePreviewPage.tsx), once a customer signs and saves the signature, the saved signature image must render inline in the 'Customer Signature' area and persist so it is included in all export and share actions. The signed invoice must be shareable via four channels: (1) PDF download using html2canvas + jsPDF — the existing 'Download PDF' button must capture the full invoice including the rendered signature image; (2) HTML file share — generate a self-contained HTML string of the invoice (including the signature as a base64 data URL image) and trigger a file download as an .html file; (3) Email share — open a mailto: link pre-populated with a subject line 'Your Estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC' and a plain-text body summarizing job details (client name, date, total, and a note that the signed estimate is attached); (4) SMS/phone share — open an sms: link pre-populated with a short message: 'Your estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC is ready. Total: $[amount]. Please reply to confirm.' All four share actions must be rendered as clearly labeled buttons on the Invoice/Estimate preview page. For HTML and PDF shares the saved signature data URL must be embedded in the exported content.

quotes: signatures on estimates once signed flow to invoices to be shared to the client via pdf, HTML, email, or phone number

acceptanceCriteria: After the customer saves their signature on the invoice preview, the signature image renders inline in the 'Customer Signature' section.
A 'Download PDF' button exports the full invoice (including the inline signature image) as a PDF via html2canvas + jsPDF.
A 'Download HTML' button generates a self-contained .html file of the invoice with the signature embedded as a base64 data URL and triggers a file download.

A 'Share via Email' button opens a mailto: link with subject 'Your Estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC' and a pre-filled plain-text body containing client name, job date, post-tax total, and a message that the signed estimate is attached.

A 'Share via SMS' button opens an sms: link with the pre-populated message: 'Your estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC is ready. Total: $[amount]. Please reply to confirm.' where [amount] is the post-tax total.
All four share buttons are clearly labeled and visible on the Invoice/Estimate preview page.
The PDF and HTML exports both include the saved signature image.

constraints: Do not remove or regress the existing signature pad canvas, useSignaturePad hook wiring, or touch drawing functionality on InvoicePreviewPage.tsx.
Do not remove or regress the Stripe payment section (Charge via Stripe button and Paid/Unpaid badge) on JobDetailPage.tsx.
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The owner principal hardcoded check ('q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe') must not be altered.
nonGoals: Real-time email delivery via SMTP or SendGrid — email share uses mailto: only.
Real-time SMS delivery via Twilio — SMS share uses sms: deep link only.
Storing the signed invoice HTML or PDF on the backend.
Adding the damage waiver to any screen other than JobDetailPage.tsx (as a job option) and InvoicePreviewPage.tsx (when waiver is enabled for the job).
Changing any existing Stripe backend logic beyond removing the instructional UI copy.
